summary: Tested P1 fixes for calendar past date styling and /api/pms/guests 500 error. All tests passed - guests endpoint returns 200 with walk-in placeholder emails, calendar displays past dates with gray styling, no React duplicate key warnings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 fixes verified working: (1) Guest.email changed from EmailStr to str in schemas.py - allows walk-in-xxx@placeholder.local emails (2) isPastDate() function added to calendarHelpers.js and used in CalendarGrid.js for gray styling on past dates

backend_apis.GET /api/pms/guests: PASS - Returns 200 with all guests including walk-in guests with placeholder.local emails
backend_apis.GET /api/pms/rooms: PASS - Returns room list for calendar
backend_apis.GET /api/pms/bookings: PASS - Returns bookings with date range filter

frontend_features.Calendar past date styling: PASS - Dates 17,18,19 show rgba(229,231,235,0.7) gray background vs white for future dates
frontend_features.Today highlight (blue): PASS - Date 20 shows rgb(239,246,255) blue-50 background
frontend_features.Weekend orange tint: PASS - Dates 21,22 (Cts,Paz) show rgb(255,247,237) orange-50 background
frontend_features.Diagonal stripe pattern on past cells: PASS - Visible in room cells for past dates
frontend_features.No duplicate key warnings: PASS - Console shows 0 duplicate key warnings
frontend_features.Booking bars render: PASS - Found 9 booking bars in calendar view

guests_500_error.issue: /api/pms/guests returned 500 due to Pydantic EmailStr rejecting walk-in-xxx@placeholder.local emails
guests_500_error.fix_applied: Changed Guest.email from EmailStr to str in /app/backend/models/schemas.py line 808
guests_500_error.status: VERIFIED FIXED - endpoint returns 200 with 42+ guests including walk-in guests

calendar_past_date_styling.issue: Past dates in calendar were not visually distinguished
calendar_past_date_styling.fix_applied: Added isPastDate() function to calendarHelpers.js (line 225) and used in CalendarGrid.js (lines 124, 171, 305)
calendar_past_date_styling.status: VERIFIED FIXED - past dates show gray background with diagonal stripe pattern

react_duplicate_key_warning.issue: Console showed duplicate key warnings in React
react_duplicate_key_warning.fix_applied: Fixed key prop assignments in CalendarGrid.js
react_duplicate_key_warning.status: VERIFIED FIXED - 0 duplicate key warnings in console
